title: Grep tool output view component with summary and chips
purpose: Displays the output of a grep tool call with formatted input chips, match summary, and output panel.
module_context: Exports a React component named GrepView that renders tool call data with pattern highlighting, input parameter chips, and summary statistics.

steps.content: Render a chip element with label and value.
Apply consistent styling for inline display with background and text colors.
Format the label as bold and the value as monospace font.
Extract input parameters from the tool call item.
Parse and normalize boolean flags from the input.
Generate a summary of matches and files if output is a non-empty string.
Prepare stdout for display if output is a string.
Render the pattern as a monospace code block.
Display input parameters as chips in a flex container.
Show the summary if it was generated.
Render the output panel with tool use ID, status, stdout, and error information.
